CustomObject.label: Elaro Module Registry
CustomObject.description: Registry for dynamically loading compliance modules. Third parties can register custom modules by creating records of this type with a valid Apex class implementing IComplianceModule.

fields.label: Class Name
fields.description: Fully qualified Apex class name implementing IComplianceModule (e.g., MyCustomModule)

fields.label: Framework
fields.description: Framework identifier this module handles (e.g., CUSTOM_FRAMEWORK)

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this module is currently active and should be loaded

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Load priority (lower numbers load first). Default: 100

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Human-readable description of what this module does
